items.claim: Damen Pinas possesses high-level striking and significant knockout power.
items.quote: Damen Pinas is a sensational prospect with awesome [__] power. His striking is high level, man.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra is a round-one bully who has not been tested in the later phases of a fight.
items.quote: Ryan Gandra is a round one bully. We don't really know what happens at a high level past those early phases.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra has spent less than three minutes in the cage across his last three fights.
items.quote: it's been less than three minutes in his last three fights.

items.claim: Zachary Reese struggles with big punches when caught in range.
items.quote: I think Zachary Reese struggles with big punches in range.

items.claim: Zachary Reese possesses tricky jiu-jitsu and effective body kicks.
items.quote: Zach Ree has nice body kicks. Zach Ree does have tricky jiu-jitsu.
